_comment: Actor capabilities, enforced by tasks.py at validate/apply. Deny-by-default: an actor absent from this file may apply nothing. Adding a skill = adding an entry here (data, not code). '*' means unrestricted. 'edges' governs topology edges emitted directly in result.edges (SEMANTIC_EDGES: parent/blocked_by/generated_from); annotation edges (relates_to, ...) are metadata and stay ungated. Topology — new tasks via 'relations', dependency edges via 'edges' — is how the work graph changes; an actor without those capabilities may change a task's contents but not the graph's shape (see CONTRACTS: Topology).
